title: sedum anglicum
intro: Sedum anglicum, also known as English stonecrop, is a perennial succulent plant belonging to the family Crassulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sedum anglicum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in the production of herbal remedies for skin and digestive issues.
